title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANABO, PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3415 / 57 OG No. 8, 1372 (February 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2821, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANABO, PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

Be it enacted, by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following sitios in the Municipality of Panabo, Province of Davao, are converted or constituted into barrios therein, to wit:

Sitio Mugopsing, to be known as the barrio of Magopsing; and

Sitios of Carriedo and New Camiling, into a distinct and independent barrio, to be known as the barrio of Alejal.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
